resources.string: Bluetooth not supported on this device
Alerts when SmartCane detects obstacles, smoke, or high temperature
HAZARD! Smoke or high temperature detected
Hazard! Smoke or high temperature detected.
Emergency! SOS panic button pressed on the cane. Help may be needed.
Danger! You have been near an obstacle for too long.
Caretaker chat IDs (one per line or commas)
Each caretaker: open your bot in Telegram, send /start, then tap Link Caretaker. Repeat for more people—or paste IDs manually.
This chat ID is already listed
Enter bot token to get started
Link a caretaker or enter Chat ID first
No one has messaged the bot yet. Ask the caretaker to open Telegram and send /start to your bot.
🚨 SmartCane ALERT\nSmoke or high temperature detected!\nTime: %s
⚠️ SmartCane ALERT\nPerson stuck near obstacle for 5+ seconds!\nTime: %s
✅ SmartCane test alert — Telegram is working!

🆘 SmartCane SOS — PANIC BUTTON
The user pressed the emergency button on the cane.

Cane clock: %1$s
Distance: %2$.0f cm
Smoke: %3$d
Temp: %4$.1f °C
Humidity: %5$.1f%%
Last app status: %6$s
Phone time: %7$s
DANGER! Stuck near obstacle for 5+ seconds
SOS: Panic button on cane — user needs help
Location permission needed for caretaker alerts
Turn on location/GPS in settings, then return to SmartCane
SOS recorded — add Telegram bot & caretakers in Settings to notify them
Configure your Telegram bot to receive caretaker alerts
Your smart safety companion for the visually impaired.\n\nSmartCane connects to sensors on your cane to detect obstacles, smoke, and high temperatures — keeping you and your caretaker informed.

The cane detects obstacles, smoke, and dangerous temperatures around you.

• You will hear voice alerts through the phone speaker
• The phone vibrates with different patterns for each danger
• No need to look at the screen — everything is hands-free

As a caretaker, you will receive free Telegram alerts only for real emergencies:

• Smoke or fire detected — instant Telegram message
• Person stuck near obstacle for 5+ seconds — alert sent
• Every alert includes a Google Maps link with their live location
• Add multiple caretakers in Settings — link each person (or use a group chat ID)
• Normal distance warnings are local only — no spam

Just link your Telegram bot once in the app — it's completely free!

Setting up is easy:

1. Pair the HC-05 Bluetooth module in your phone's Bluetooth settings

2. Open SmartCane, tap Connect, and select the device

3. Create a free Telegram bot via @BotFather and link it in the app

That's it — the cane is ready to protect you!

SmartCane needs a few permissions to work:

• Bluetooth — to connect to the cane
• Location — to share your position with the caretaker in emergencies
• Internet — to send free Telegram alerts to the caretaker
• Notifications — to show hazard alerts on this phone

You will be asked to grant these when you start the app. Tap Get Started to begin!
